tickets.title: Event snapshot binary contract v1
tickets.acceptance_criteria: docs/contracts/event_snapshot_v1.md defines header fields, record types, CRC rules, FULL_STATE/DELTA semantics, versioning, and max bounds
tickets.test_cases: Parser accepts valid v1 sample; rejects malformed lengths, bad crc, unsupported major; delta base_sequence mismatch handled

tickets.title: Named pipe wire protocol contract v1
tickets.acceptance_criteria: docs/contracts/ipc_pipe_v1.md defines frame header, message types, command payloads, ACK/ERROR semantics, limits
tickets.test_cases: Protocol vectors for valid/invalid frames, crc mismatch, oversize payload, unknown msg type

tickets.title: Render invalidation API contract
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Interface for dirty rect handoff and threading ownership frozen in docs/contracts/render_invalidation_api.md
tickets.test_cases: Contract examples cover single/multi-monitor and full-frame fallback

tickets.title: DefView-relative desktop attach controller
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Host window attaches relative to SHELLDLL_DefView parent without WorkerW assumptions and survives explorer restarts
tickets.test_cases: Cold start, explorer restart, missing DefView retry path

tickets.title: Desktop icon visibility manager with ownership token
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Hide/restore logic tracks ownership and restores safely on shutdown/crash recovery rules
tickets.test_cases: Icons hidden before app start, app-owned hide then crash, app-owned hide then graceful exit

tickets.title: Shell/session/display event router
tickets.acceptance_criteria: TaskbarCreated, WM_DISPLAYCHANGE, WTS session, and power events trigger deterministic rebind/resume behavior
tickets.test_cases: Lock/unlock, logoff/logon, display change, suspend/resume

tickets.title: Per-adapter D3D11 device manager
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Creates/reuses devices by adapter LUID with debug toggle and deterministic teardown
tickets.test_cases: Single adapter and mixed adapter boot path

tickets.title: Per-monitor flip-model swapchain manager
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Swapchains created/resized per monitor with proper format and frame latency settings
tickets.test_cases: Monitor add/remove, orientation change, DPI change

tickets.title: Dirty rect composition and Present1 path
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Composition texture is authoritative frame source; dirty rect copy and Present1 submission works
tickets.test_cases: Small rect updates, multi-rect update, full-frame fallback correctness

tickets.title: Dirty rect coalescer with thresholds
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Rect merge policy and max rect cap with area fallback implemented and unit-tested
tickets.test_cases: Fragmented rect stress, threshold crossing to full frame

tickets.title: Device removed/reset recovery state machine
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Handles DXGI device-loss errors with recreate/rebind and bounded retries
tickets.test_cases: Synthetic device lost, graphics reset path validation

tickets.title: WGS84 and ECEF math module
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Double-precision coordinate conversion and ellipsoid intersection utilities implemented
tickets.test_cases: Roundtrip conversion set and ray hit/miss/tangent tests

tickets.title: Free-fly/orbit camera controller
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Camera modes, smoothing, and constraints produce stable movement without jitter
tickets.test_cases: Mode switching, pitch clamps, long-session drift

tickets.title: Cursor-anchored zoom implementation
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Wheel zoom performs dolly toward cursor anchor and maintains projection stability
tickets.test_cases: Anchor lock error bounds across zoom ranges and monitor boundaries

tickets.title: IOCP watcher for snapshot directory changes
tickets.acceptance_criteria: ReadDirectoryChangesW overlapped watcher with generation coalescing and latest-only read scheduling
tickets.test_cases: Burst notifications and missed event recovery

tickets.title: Snapshot validator/parser with CRC and bounds checks
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Parser validates all structural invariants and surfaces deterministic errors
tickets.test_cases: Fuzz corpus malformed headers, bad lengths, and crc mismatch

tickets.title: Event store with TTL heap and clear semantics
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Upsert/clear/expire operations are O(log N) and deterministic by event_seq rules
tickets.test_cases: TTL expiry races, stale clear vs upsert ordering

tickets.title: Dirty region generation from event diffs
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Diff path emits minimal dirty coverage with style-aware padding and tile merge strategy
tickets.test_cases: Add/remove/modify/expire scenarios and coverage assertions

tickets.title: Overlay throttle gate and coalesced update policy
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Output presents capped to 10Hz under high-rate input while preserving latest state
tickets.test_cases: 20Hz and 50Hz ingest bursts, queue growth checks

tickets.title: Overlapped named pipe server and framing
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Server accepts framed binary messages and emits ACK/ERROR replies with sequence tracking
tickets.test_cases: Handshake, good/bad frames, reconnect behavior

tickets.title: IPC security and client identity enforcement
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Pipe ACL plus impersonation checks enforce same-user and same-session access
tickets.test_cases: Cross-user and cross-session denial cases

tickets.title: Interactive input router for overlay window
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Mouse and keyboard input controls camera in active mode with robust capture/focus handling
tickets.test_cases: Drag with alt-tab, focus loss, key release edge cases

tickets.title: IPC vs user input arbitration state machine
tickets.acceptance_criteria: User lease model and deferred IPC coalescing prevent camera jitter under concurrent control
tickets.test_cases: User drag plus IPC rotate flood and emergency stop precedence

tickets.title: Monitor topology and DPI service
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Topology changes produce deterministic monitor context updates and notifications
tickets.test_cases: Hotplug, rotation, mixed DPI configurations

tickets.title: Scale-preserving projection policy across monitors
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Highest-res monitor defines reference density and other monitors maintain geographic scale
tickets.test_cases: Mixed resolution span and mirror mode comparisons

tickets.title: Startup manager and restart resilience
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Per-user startup and restart behavior recovers app after failures without loops
tickets.test_cases: Crash loop with backoff and relaunch validation

tickets.title: State persistence and restore pipeline
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Camera/style/mode state atomically persisted and restored with fallback on corruption
tickets.test_cases: Corrupt primary state file fallback to previous snapshot

tickets.title: Session transition and power resume handlers
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Lock/unlock/logoff/logon and suspend/resume transitions preserve correctness and resource ownership
tickets.test_cases: Cycle tests for session and power events

tickets.title: ETW instrumentation for render and ingest paths
tickets.acceptance_criteria: ETW emits render request/present/recovery and ingest throughput signals with correlation ids
tickets.test_cases: Trace contains required events in idle and active runs

tickets.title: WPR automation and perf gate scripts
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Automated capture and report pipeline compares baseline vs active scenarios and enforces thresholds
tickets.test_cases: CI run generating pass/fail report for idle and burst scenarios

tickets.title: Snapshot parser fuzz harness
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Fuzz harness runs corpus and random mutations without crashes or leaks
tickets.test_cases: Structured and random fuzz campaigns with sanitizer checks

tickets.title: IPC protocol fuzz and spam harness
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Malformed and high-rate message campaigns preserve stability and bounded memory
tickets.test_cases: Oversize frames, invalid crc, reconnect storms

tickets.title: Soak and chaos validation suite
tickets.acceptance_criteria: 24h and 72h campaigns pass with no unplanned exits and bounded resource trends
tickets.test_cases: Explorer restarts, display changes, session cycles, and device reset injections
